title: rosa davurica var. davurica
intro: Rosa davurica var. davurica is a lesser-known variety of the Rosa davurica, a species of rose native to the mountainous regions of eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa davurica var. davurica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune system function and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Rosa davurica var. davurica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
